typeProperties.script:
parameters{
	WildPath as string,
	FileName as string
}
source(allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	ignoreNoFilesFound: false,
	purgeFiles: true,
	rowUrlColumn: 'Filename',
	wildcardPaths:[($WildPath+$FileName+'.csv')]) ~> srcWeightStage
srcWeightStage derive(Filename = concat($WildPath,substring(toString(currentTimestamp()),1,4),'/',substring(toString(currentTimestamp()),6,2),'/',substring(toString(currentTimestamp()),9,2),'/',$FileName,'_',replace(replace(toString(currentTimestamp()),'.',''),':',''),'.csv'),
		each(match(name=='PROJECT NO.'), $$ = iif(length(regexSplit($$,'[-]')[1])>5,concat('99',regexSplit($$,'[-]')[1]),regexSplit($$,'[-]')[1]))) ~> setFileName
setFileName sink(allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	rowUrlColumn:'Filename',
	umask: 0022,
	preCommands: [],
	postCommands: [],
	skipDuplicateMapInputs: true,
	skipDuplicateMapOutputs: true) ~> snkWeightRaw
